index_meta_description: Strategic overview of your athletes performance and compliance.
index_empty_desc: Connecting athletes allows you to track their weekly compliance and live activity feed.
athletes_meta_description: Manage your athlete roster, invitations, and coaching requests.
athletes_pending_requests_desc: Athletes from your public start page are waiting for your review.
athletes_empty_desc: Send a direct email invite, create one share link for your community, or use an athlete's personal invite code.
athletes_no_group: No athletes assigned to this group yet.
athletes_onboarding_title: Invite athletes by email or connect by code
athletes_onboarding_desc: Send a direct join link to a new athlete, or keep using their existing personal invite code if they already shared one with you. You can also create a public share link for Facebook groups or community posts.
athletes_pending_invites_desc: Manage private email invites and public share links from one place.
index_empty_pending_desc: You have athletes waiting for approval. Review them to start coaching.
calendar_failed_load_activity_desc: This activity may have been deleted or is no longer available.
calendar_failed_load_lane_desc: Could not load this athlete calendar.
team_invite_desc: Give this code to your coach so they can connect to your account and manage your training.
